summary: Marine Hull insurance covering physical loss or damage to ocean-going vessels, including machinery breakdown and collision liability. Core London Market line written on Institute Time Clauses (Hulls) 1/11/95 or IHC 2003.

schemaEntities.description: Vessel entity. Custom: IMO_Number, VesselClass, GrossTonnage, NetTonnage, YearBuilt, Flag, ClassSociety, ClassSocietyStatus, TradingArea, VesselType, PropulsionType, FreeboardCertificate, ISM_Compliance, AIS_Fitted.
112 rules: class society status acceptability, trading area limit enforcement, ISM compliance mandatory check, age-related deductible application, war risk area exclusions (JWC Listed Areas).
Classification society entity. Custom: SocietyCode, ClassNotation, SurveyCycle, LastSurveyDate, ClassSuspendedFlag.

relationships.note: Hull valuation and deductibles driven by 14 vessel custom fields
Class society status and ISM compliance are underwriting hard stops
Class society certification required -- suspension triggers automatic decline

migrationIssues.detail: Vessel_MH has 14 custom fields with no standard GW Cloud marine entity. Complete new vessel entity design required for GW Cloud migration.
Real-time class society status lookup (Lloyd's Register, DNV, Bureau Veritas) required at bind. No GW Cloud native integration -- external API required.
JWC war risk listed areas and trading limit enforcement. Dynamic JWC area list requires external data feed -- no GW Cloud equivalent.
Vessel age deductible schedule uses non-standard rating table format. GW Cloud rating framework requires restructuring.

cloudMapping.action: Design marine vessel entity in GW Cloud -- core field for IMO registry integration
Real-time class society status API integration required at quote/bind
JWC dynamic trading area list integration -- new external data feed
Classification society entity requires new GW Cloud design
